name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-25
title: Inv 40 enumeration completeness test; duplicate invariant numbering cleanup; new-feature.py move follow-up
description:
1. No test pins Inv 40 enumeration completeness — a new script added to scripts/ would not fail any test. Add test that walks scripts/*.py and asserts each is enumerated in Inv 40 (this is exactly why repo-permissions.py drifted out).

2. Duplicate invariant numbering in spec.md: numbers 11, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29 each used twice in different sections. Pre-existing; cleanup as a focused pass to flatten into a single monotonic series.

3. Follow-up backlog for the new-feature.py move from rabbit-cage to rabbit-feature (deferred from RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-24). Once moved, update rabbit-feature-new SKILL.md to point at new location, remove from rabbit-cage scripts/, and prune from contract/provides.

4. feature.json updated_note field duplicates info that should live in CLAUDE.md or contract artifact — consider dropping.

5. contract.md provides.scripts not validated for path existence — add test asserting listed scripts actually exist (this is why the contract drifted to list relink.sh and dispatch-feature-edit.sh undetected).

history.note: Cycle complete (parts 1, 4, 5): Inv 92/93/94 added; Inv 18 enumeration test, updated_note dropped, contract.md provides.scripts existence test all wired and passing. Parts 2 (duplicate invariant numbering) resolved by ws36 renumber. Part 3 (new-feature.py move) resolved by RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-26 in PR #181.
